items.briefing:
New data from insurer QBE finds that AI is now linked to around half of all cyber incidents affecting Australian organisations — a significant rise that highlights how quickly the threat landscape is evolving. This doesn't just mean AI-powered attacks; it also includes risks from staff using AI tools in ways that expose sensitive data.

Australian businesses running online stores should also be aware that eCommerce growth brings hidden security risks, such as weaknesses in payment processes and third-party integrations that can be exploited by criminals.

**Practical tip:** Review what AI tools your staff are using at work and make sure there's a clear policy on what information can and can't be entered into them.

featured.title: AI linked to half of Australian cyber incidents, QBE
featured.quote: AI involvement in half of Australian cyber incidents reveals emerging threat landscape requiring urgent national response.
